description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet with a streamlined fuselage and swept-back wings, finished in a glossy white with subtle red and black accent stripes. The aircraft features two rear-mounted turbofan engines, positioned on either side of the tail section, and a T-tail configuration for enhanced aerodynamic stability. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with a series of small, rectangular windows running along the passenger cabin. The wings are low-mounted with noticeable winglets at the tips, contributing to improved fuel efficiency and handling. The landing gear appears to be retractable, with the main gear housed under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. Overall, the jet exudes a sense of luxury and performance, suitable for executive or private travel.
description: A modern white business jet with swept low-mounted wings, rear twin turbofan engines, and a T-tail, accented by red and black stripes.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the fuselage, cockpit windows, winglets, and the twin rear-mounted engines.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the T-tail, twin engines, and the full wingspan with upward-angled winglets.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, displaying the passenger windows, wing structure, and tail assembly.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the nose, cockpit, and the symmetry of the wings and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with main gear under the wings and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and rectangular windows.
